user.title: SOFAR ME3000SP Controller
user.description:
Select the entities for your SOFAR ME3000SP setup.

**Smart meter:** export + import (kW)
**PV inverter:** power (W)
**ESPHome SOFAR device:** mode select, charge/discharge rate, battery SOC, fault messages

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure SOFAR ME3000SP Controller
reconfigure.description: Adjust your entity mapping. The integration reloads automatically.

error.must_be_entity_id: Must be a valid entity ID (sensor.xxx, select.xxx or number.xxx)
error.already_configured: This SOFAR mode entity is already configured
